name: Manhattan Platinum Credit Card
exclusions: Fees and charges (including annual fee and finance charges)
milestoneBenefits: Annual fee waiver on spends of ₹1,20,000 or more in the previous year
additionalBenefits: 1% fuel surcharge waiver at authorized pumps

salaried: Eligibility is subject to Standard Chartered approval criteria
selfEmployed: Eligibility is subject to Standard Chartered approval criteria

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-14.
5% cashback applies on grocery, supermarket, and departmental store purchases of ₹1,000 or more.
Groceries cashback is capped at ₹150 per transaction and ₹500 per calendar month.
Other spends earn 3 reward points per ₹150 spent (effectively 0.5% return value).
